profile.role_zh: 计算机学院大三·转行焦虑者
profile.innate_zh: 勤奋但缺乏方向感、适应力一般
profile.learned_zh: 实习经历让她意识到专业和兴趣的巨大错位
profile.learned_en: Internships revealed huge gap between major and interest
profile.belief_zh: 找到喜欢的事比什么都重要
profile.belief_en: Finding what you love beats everything
profile.goal_zh: 转行产品设计或交互设计
profile.contradiction_zh: 家里期望她做程序员 vs 自己更想做设计
profile.contradiction_en: Family wants her to code vs. she wants design
profile.surface_zh: 乖巧听话、不太表达意见
profile.deep_zh: 内心非常挣扎，经常质疑自己的选择
profile.deep_en: Intense internal struggle; doubts her choices
profile.fear_zh: 走上一条不喜欢的路然后后悔一辈子
profile.fear_en: Walking a path she doesn't love and regretting for life
profile.rhythm_zh: 机械地完成日常任务，晚上私下学设计
profile.rhythm_en: Does daily tasks mechanically; studies design at night
profile.long_desire_zh: 建立自己的设计作品集
profile.short_goal_zh: 今晚跟着教程做完一个UI练习
profile.short_goal_en: Finish a UI exercise from a tutorial tonight
profile.constraint_zh: 专业课不能挂；父母不支持转行
profile.constraint_en: Can't fail major courses; parents oppose change
profile.bias_zh: 倾向美化设计行业；低估跨专业转行的难度
profile.narrative_zh: 我只是还没准备好告诉他们我的决定
profile.narrative_en: I'm just not ready to tell them my decision yet
